headline: Analog Devices Deepens AI Power And RF Role As Valuation Stays Rich
summary: Analog Devices (NasdaqGS:ADI) has completed its acquisition of Empower Semiconductor, expanding its power management portfolio for AI infrastructure. The company is working with MathWorks to develop RF digital twin capabilities for earlier and more accurate modeling of radar and satellite communication systems. For investors watching the build out of AI data centers, Analog Devices sits in the middle of a key plumbing problem: how to power increasingly demanding chips efficiently. The...
